description: This file defines AWS Lambda handler functions for product management operations such as get, create, update, delete, and list products. It interacts with data access layer, logging, metrics, and utility modules, and uses AWS Lambda Powertools for tracing.

methods.name: get_product
methods.description: Handles retrieving a single product based on ID from the event path parameters.

methods.name: create_product
methods.description: Handles creating a new product with data from the event body.

methods.name: update_product
methods.description: Handles updating an existing product identified by ID with data from the event body.

methods.name: delete_product
methods.description: Handles deleting a product identified by ID.

methods.name: get_products
methods.description: Handles retrieving all products for a tenant.
